upasargachandrika.example_text: 'prAkroSan BEravaM SivAH' (BA॰saBA॰) prakfzwamavASyantetyarTaH uccEraruvan
pracukruSurmahAtmAno hfzwarUpAH (rA॰4.25.35) ukto'rTaH
'prAkroSaduccEH santrastA mahArAjeti nEzaDam' (BA॰vana॰63.2) AhvayadityarTaH
'AryeReva parAkruzwaM hA sIte lakzmaReti ca' (rA0 3597) parAkruzwamuccErAkranditam atyantamudGozitam
'evamukte tu BIzmeRa tataH saYcukruSurnfpAH' (BA॰saBA॰44.35) samam uccEScakranduH
'saNkroSatAmenAn (amitrAn) dyAvApfTivI' (aTarva॰8.8.21) sakroDamaBisamboDayatAmityAha
'ftAvarIriva saNkroSamAnAH' (f॰4.18.6) saNkroSamAnAH=saNkroSantyaH=uccEH SabdAyamAnAH
'janayizyati saNkroSaM rAmasya vivAsanam' (rA॰2.58.30) saNkroSam=hAhAkAram duHKamiti tu tilakaH
'etena vA aNgirasaH saMkroSamAnAH svargaM lokamAyan' (paYca0 brA0 12323) saMkroSamAnAH saMhatya SabdaM parasparAhvAnarUpaM priyavAkyaM vadantaH
'samprAkruzwe ruditastrIkumAre' (BA0 droRa0 221) ANaScAritArTyepi samprayorekatarasya vEyarTyaM vispazwam
'tato vyUQezvanIkezu samutkruzwezu mAriza' (BA0 droRa0 881) uccErAkroSatsu uccErnadatsu
'avakruzwaH kokilayA'vakokilaH' (svareRa) aDikzipto nyakkftaH
'BrAtfnanye pitfnanye putrAnanye vicukruSuH' (BA0 sO0 8121) vicukruSuH=AcakranduH
'kfzRaM ca jizRuM ca hariM naraM ca trARAya vikroSati' (BA0 saBA0 6733) Bavati
'kasya vayaM vikroSAmaH' (maDyama0 1) AkrandAma ityarTaH

'rAGavastutisaMyuktA gagane ca vicukruSuH sADu sADviti hfzwAnAM devAnAM SoBanA giraH' (rA0 69269).. vicukruSuH=pratidaDvanuH pratiDvanitAH pratiSabditAH pratiSrutvatyo baBUvurityarTaH kroSatirihAkarmakaH
'RacaH striyAmaY' (pA0 5414) atra vyAvakroSItyudAhftaM vfttO anyonyasyAvakroSanaM vyAvakroSI Bavati
'hA priye kvAsi nazwAsi vyAkroSannyapatat kzitO' (rA0 3682) vyAkroSan uccErAkroSan
'aye gOrInATa tripurahara SamBo trinayana prasIdetyAkroSan' (Bartf0 387) AkroSan uccErudAharan
'patimAcukruSuScApi sasvanaM cApi cukruSuH' (rA0 2206) AcukruSurAcakranduH
'A'nyaH kroSati prAnyaH SaMsati' (tE0 saM0 7593) AkroSati nindati avakzipati parivadati
'yaTABipretamitarAM brahmacAryAkroSet' (lAwyA0 SrO0 4316) AkroSet Sapet
'kruDyantaM na pratikruDyedAkruzwaH kuSalaM vadet' (manu0 648) AkruzwaH SaptaH apaSabdamuktaH
'tatra svAkzAraRA yaH syAdAkroSo mETunaM prati' (amara:) AkroSo'BiSaMsanam
'AkroSamapi parihAsamAkalayanti' (kAda0) AkroSo nindA apavAdaH
'zazWyA AkroSe' (pA0 6321) ukto'rTaH
'SataM brAhmaRamAkruSya kzatriyo daRqamarhati' (manu0 8267) AkruSya=aBiSapya=apaBAzya
'taM tu mAM jIvaloko'yaM nUnamAkrozwumarhati' (rA0 21266) AkrozwuM Dikkartum
'taM vatsaM meDAtiTirAkroSadabrAhmaRosi SUdrAputra iti' (paYca0 brA0 1465) AkroSadaSapat paruzaM vyAharat sADikzepamavadan
'udakroSan vipramuKyA viDunvanto'jinAni ca' (BA0 Adi0 1882) udakroSan uccErAkrandan
'uccukruSuSca kOravyA gAnDarvAnprekzya pIqitAn' (BA0 vana0 24122)
'Agamya KARqavaprasTamudakroSat sa pARqavAn hriyate goDanaM kzudrEH' (BA0 Adi0 2136-7) udakroSad uccErAhvayat
'sUtAnuccukruSuH kecidrayAn yojayateti ca' (BA0 Adi0 22018) uccEH smAhuH jahAra ca sa viprARAM ratnAnyutkroSatAmapi uccErAkrandatAmityarTaH
'tataSca sarvErutkruzwaM…prasAdaM kuru BUpeti' (mArka0 pu0 1547) ukto'rTaH
'aTotkruzwaM tadA hfzwEH sarvErdevErudAyuDEH' (BA0 vana0 23177) utkruzwamudDuzitam kzveqA'kriyatetyarTaH
'muniSizyEraTotkruzwe' (BA0 ASva0) Akrandite sati utkroSakurarO samAvityamaraH uccEH kroSatItyutkroSaH
'taM BUtAnyaByakroSan brahmahanniti' (tE0 saM0 2512) aByakroSan sanindamAhvayan sakroDaM samaboDayan
'tato vAlinamudyamya sugrIvaH SibikAM tadA AropayadaBikroSannaNgadena saha praBuH' (rA0 42528).. aBikroSan vilapan paridevayamAnaH Aropayata vikroSannaNgadena sahEva tviti pAWAntaram
'na vA anaByutkruzwa indro vIryaM kartumarhatyaByenamutkroSAmeti' (E0 brA0 812) aByutkroSAma uccEH praSastyodDarzayAmetyarTaH
'AkruzwaH puruzaH sarvaM pratyAkroSedanantaram' (BA0 vana0 2927) pratyAkroSet pratiSapet
'BImamArtasvaraM kftvA hAheti paricukruSuH' (BA0 Adi0 11942) paricukruSuH paritaScakranduH
'parikruzwaM ca' (Apa0 Da0 11817) BoktukAmA AgacCata ityevaM parikruSya sarvata AhUya yad dIyate tat parikruzwamucyate
'upakruzwaM jIvitaM santyajeyuH' (BA0 u0 258) upakruzwaM ninditaM sApavAdam avagItam
'boDisatvaH kila kasmiMScidanupakruzwagotracAritre… mahati brAhmaRakule janma-parigrahaM cakAra' (avadA0 brAhmaRajA0) anupakruzwe anavagIte gotra-cAritre yasya tasmin
'na SaknomyupakroSaM pfTivyAM DAtumAtmanaH' (rA0 36226) upakroSo'pavAdaH
'prARErupakroSamalImasErvA' (raGu0 253) ukto'rTaH
